test.create_query: CREATE TABLE wide_volume_reducing ( id UInt64, s String, arr Array(UInt64) ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO wide_volume_reducing SELECT number, repeat('x', 256), range(number % 64) FROM numbers(20000000)
test.query: SELECT length(s) FROM wide_volume_reducing ORDER BY id LIMIT 1000 FORMAT Null
SELECT length(arr) FROM wide_volume_reducing ORDER BY id LIMIT 1000 FORMAT Null
SELECT empty(s) FROM wide_volume_reducing ORDER BY id LIMIT 100000 FORMAT Null
SELECT lengthUTF8(s) FROM wide_volume_reducing LIMIT 1000 FORMAT Null
SELECT length(s) FROM wide_volume_reducing WHERE id % 2 = 0 FORMAT Null
SELECT notEmpty(arr) FROM wide_volume_reducing WHERE id % 2 = 0 FORMAT Null
